keywords.name: group
keywords.description: The group slot slot is set to s for the newly created mpoint. If the slot keyword is not specified, then the group name is assigned to the slot with name Default .

keywords.name: id
keywords.description: Mpoint ID. If not specified, then the next available ID is used. An error is raised if an mpoint with the specified ID already exists in the system.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Mpoint position that is the origin by default.

keywords.name: position-x
keywords.description: The \(x\) -component of the mpoint position that is 0 by default.

keywords.name: position-y
keywords.description: The \(y\) -component of the mpoint position that is 0 by default.

keywords.name: position-z
keywords.description: The \(z\) -component of the mpoint position that is 0 by default.

keywords.name: volume
keywords.description: Mpoint volume, where f > 0. An exception is thrown if an mpoint with zero volume exists in the model when cycling starts. The equivalent sphere radius is automatically assigned to the mpoint.
